summary: Classified all five open PRs independently from the hydrated live PR inventory artifact. No shared canonical was selected. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-PR action is safe or allowed for this shard; two PRs have explicit maintainer-review decision points and the remaining three should stay open as independent work blocked by proof or CI/review readiness.

actions.reason: Standalone network/proxy fix with unique scope and insufficient proof; keep open as independent work rather than closing or tying it to this inventory shard.
This is a focused standalone PR with sufficient proof but an explicit maintainer-review decision about the broader linked issue and failing checks; needs maintainer judgment, not cleanup closure.
Unique session-state/message-delivery PR with unresolved proof and CI blockers; keep as independent open work.
Standalone cron/session-lock race fix with mixed readiness signals and failing checks; keep open independently rather than closing or merging from this cleanup shard.
Maintainer-owned standalone Codex PR appears close to ready but requires maintainer technical review and merge-preflight outside this inventory cleanup job.

needs_human: #84589: maintainer should decide whether the closing reference to broader issue #10354 is appropriate and how to handle failing checks before any merge path.
#84680: maintainer-owned, broadly green Codex PR needs maintainer technical review and merge-preflight; this shard cannot merge or repair it.
